title: tanacetum integrifolium
intro: Tanacetum integrifolium, also known as whole leaf tansy, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant contains compounds like borneol and camphor, which have been used for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum integrifolium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum integrifolium include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
